</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Baloxavir Marboxil 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Treatment of influenza Xofluza is indicated for the treatment of uncomplicated influenza in patients aged 1 year and above. Post exposure prophylaxis of influenza Xofluza is indicated for...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>influenza, severe, susceptibility to（99.6%）</li>
<li>acquired hemophagocytic lymphohistiocytosis associated with malignant disease（98.8%）</li>
<li>hemophagocytic syndrome associated with an infection（98.8%）</li>
<li>influenza（98.7%）</li>
<li>cardioencephalomyopathy, fatal infantile, due to cytochrome c oxidase deficiency（98.5%）</li>
<li>Singleton-Merten syndrome（97.8%）</li>
<li>hemophagocytic syndrome（95.0%）</li>
<li>chronic hepatitis C virus infection（95.0%）</li>
<li>hepatitis C virus infection（93.3%）</li>
<li>hepatitis E virus infection（92.5%）</li>
<li>hepatitis A virus infection（92.4%）</li>
<li>Omsk hemorrhagic fever（92.0%）</li>
<li>Kyasanur forest disease（91.8%）</li>
<li>hepatitis, viral, animal（91.6%）</li>
<li>hepatitis B virus infection（89.7%）</li>
<li>pyelonephritis（88.0%）</li>
<li>squamous cell lung carcinoma（85.0%）</li>
<li>mendelian susceptibility to mycobacterial diseases due to complete ISG15 deficiency（84.1%）</li>
<li>A20 haploinsufficiency（82.7%）</li>
<li>immune dysregulation with inflammatory bowel disease（82.1%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
